packs.name: SAM Procurement Starter
packs.description: High-precision starter ontology for SAM.gov research pivots. Rules favor notice metadata and procurement context over broad single-word matches.

packs.name: SAM DoD Program Protection and SAP
packs.description: Contextual indicators for AFOSI/SAP security and program protection work where procurement language is present.

rules.pattern: \b(?:AFOSI|Office of Special Investigations)\b.{0,120}\b(?:program protection|program security|industrial security|special access(?:\s+program)?|SAP security)\b

\b(?:AFTTEZ?|SAF/(?:AQL|AQR|AQX|AAH|AAZ|OCX)|NPMS|SAPCO|AFOSIPJ|Office of Competitive Activities|Air Force Test Center|Air Force Test Pilot School|DAF Rapid Capabilities Office|RCO)\b.{0,180}\b(?:program protection|security|compliance|test support|operations support|engineering support|infrastructure|staff support|acquisition support)\b

\b(?:Restricted Data|(?-i:RD)|Formerly Restricted Data|FRD|Special Nuclear Material|SNM|transclassified foreign nuclear information|TFNI|Foreign Intelligence Information|FII|non-contract\s+FII|Q\s+clearance|Q\s*\+\s*SEI|Office of Intelligence and Counterintelligence|OICI|DOE-INT)\b.{0,180}\b(?:handling|access|custody|transport|control|compliance|security|operations support|program support)\b

\b(?:Office of Secure Transportation|OST|Safeguards Transporter|SGT|Mobile Guardian Transporter|MGT|Nuclear Emergency Support Team|NEST|Special Response Team|SRT|DTRA|Defense Threat Reduction Agency)\b.{0,180}\b(?:exercise|readiness|escort|convoy|security|operations support|logistics support|maintenance|integration|training|response)\b
\b(?:Atomic Energy Act of 1954|DOE Order\s*153\.1A|Executive Order\s*12656)\b.{0,180}\b(?:implementation|compliance|planning|exercise|requirements|program support|operations support)\b

\b(?:Project Sentient|Recent Sentient Highlights|Deep Submergence Systems Project|DSSP|Project Sand Dollar|Project Jennifer|Project Azorian|OPNAV\s*3820|Project Sundance|Project Palladium|Operation Fishbowl|Bluegill Triple Prime)\b.{0,180}\b(?:contract|solicitation|task order|IDIQ|sole source|support|analysis|program support|historical research|FOIA)\b

packs.name: SAM DoD Flight Test and Range Instrumentation
packs.description: Flight test and range instrumentation cues tied to Edwards/412th/Plant 42 and NAWCWD China Lake contexts.

rules.pattern: \b(?:Edwards(?:\s+AFB)?|412th(?:\s+Test Wing)?|Plant\s*42)\b.{0,140}\b(?:flight test|test and evaluation|T&E|range instrumentation|telemetry|mission instrumentation)\b
\b(?:NAWCWD|Naval Air Warfare Center Weapons Division|China Lake)\b.{0,140}\b(?:telemetry|instrumentation|flight test|T&E integration|test and evaluation integration)\b

\b(?:Dugway Proving Ground|DPG|West Desert Test Center|WDTC|Utah Test and Training Range|UTTR|Tonopah Test Range|TTR|Nevada Test and Training Range|NTTR|Area\s*6|Aerial Operations Facility|AOF|NVH1|Yucca Flat|NNSA Nevada Field Office|NFO|N2S2|Kirtland(?:\s+Air\s+Force\s+Base)?|KAFB|Manzano Storage Area|Site Able|Coyote Test Field|Technical Area\s*-?\s*(?:1|2|3|4|5)|TA(?:1|2|3|4|5)|R2508|Helendale|Tehachapi|Ant Hill|Yuma Proving Ground|YPG)\b.{0,180}\b(?:test|range|telemetry|instrumentation|operations support|engineering support|facility support|infrastructure|modernization|sustainment|T&E|test and evaluation)\b

(?:\b(?:National Technology and Engineering Solutions of Sandia|NTESS|Sandia Corporation|Battelle Memorial Institute|Bechtel(?:\s+Nevada|\s+SAIC)?|EG&G|Martin Marietta|Honeywell International|Wackenhut|WSI|Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution|WHOI|WHI|BDM|TRW|Hamilton Standard|Unitech Technologies|Lockheed Martin Advanced Development Programs|Skunk Works|Boeing Phantom Works|Northrop Grumman Advanced Technology Development Center|MITRE|Aerospace Corporation|CNA Corporation|RAND Corporation)\b.{0,220}\b(?:Dugway Proving Ground|DPG|West Desert Test Center|WDTC|Utah Test and Training Range|UTTR|Tonopah Test Range|TTR|Nevada Test and Training Range|NTTR|Area\s*6|Aerial Operations Facility|AOF|NVH1|Yucca Flat|NNSA Nevada Field Office|NFO|Kirtland|KAFB|Manzano Storage Area|Site Able|Coyote Test Field|R2508|Helendale|Tehachapi|Ant Hill|Yuma Proving Ground|YPG|AUTEC|PMRF|Diego Garcia|NSWC\s+Crane|Weapons Systems Division\s+JXN)\b|\b(?:Dugway Proving Ground|DPG|West Desert Test Center|WDTC|Utah Test and Training Range|UTTR|Tonopah Test Range|TTR|Nevada Test and Training Range|NTTR|Area\s*6|Aerial Operations Facility|AOF|NVH1|Yucca Flat|NNSA Nevada Field Office|NFO|Kirtland|KAFB|Manzano Storage Area|Site Able|Coyote Test Field|R2508|Helendale|Tehachapi|Ant Hill|Yuma Proving Ground|YPG|AUTEC|PMRF|Diego Garcia|NSWC\s+Crane|Weapons Systems Division\s+JXN)\b.{0,220}\b(?:National Technology and Engineering Solutions of Sandia|NTESS|Sandia Corporation|Battelle Memorial Institute|Bechtel(?:\s+Nevada|\s+SAIC)?|EG&G|Martin Marietta|Honeywell International|Wackenhut|WSI|Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution|WHOI|WHI|BDM|TRW|Hamilton Standard|Unitech Technologies|Lockheed Martin Advanced Development Programs|Skunk Works|Boeing Phantom Works|Northrop Grumman Advanced Technology Development Center|MITRE|Aerospace Corporation|CNA Corporation|RAND Corporation)\b).{0,140}\b(?:operations support|engineering support|test support|instrumentation support|telemetry support|facility support|infrastructure support|sustainment support|integration support)\b

packs.name: SAM DoD Advanced Aerospace Support
packs.description: Advanced aerospace and low-observable integration cues with explicit engineering/support context.

rules.pattern: \b(?:advanced aerospace|air vehicle|aerospace platform|airframe)\b.{0,140}\b(?:systems integration|mission systems integration|prototype integration|platform integration)\b

packs.name: SAM DoD Intel Recovery and Undersea Support
packs.description: ONR/ONI/NRO/NGA/SOCOM-adjacent procurement cues plus undersea recovery and technical support context.

rules.pattern: \b(?:ONR|Office of Naval Research|ONI|Office of Naval Intelligence|NRO|National Reconnaissance Office|NGA|National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency|SOCOM|USSOCOM)\b.{0,160}\b(?:technical support|program support|operations support|integration support|analysis support|engineering support)\b

\b(?:NURO|Navy Special Program|NSP|NUWC|AUTEC|PMRF|ocean battlespace sensors?|acoustic navigation|side scan|UUV|AUV)\b.{0,180}\b(?:recovery|salvage|collection|sensor|comm(?:unications)? systems?|integration|operations support|engineering support|program support|test support)\b

\b(?:Deep Submergence Rescue Vehicle|DSRV|Mystic\s+DSRV-?1|Avalon\s+DSRV-?2|Deep Submergence Search Vehicle|DSSV|dry submersible|Hughes\s+Glomar\s+Explorer|NR-1)\b.{0,180}\b(?:support|modernization|sustainment|maintenance|integration|operations|recovery|salvage|program support)\b

\b(?:Project Sentient|Recent Sentient Highlights|NURO|Navy Special Program|NSP|Deep Submergence Systems Project|DSSP|Project Sand Dollar|Project Jennifer|Project Azorian|OPNAV\s*3820|Project Sundance|Project Palladium|Operation Fishbowl|Bluegill Triple Prime)\b.{0,180}\b(?:contract|solicitation|task order|IDIQ|sole source|support|analysis|program support|historical research|FOIA)\b

packs.name: SAM DoD Hardened Subsurface Infrastructure
packs.description: Subsurface, shaft, and hardened infrastructure cues that only score when paired with engineering/procurement context.

rules.pattern: \b(?:hidden cavities?|deep shaft structures?|incline shaft|vertical elevator shaft|access shaft|tunnel boring machine|TBM|Robbins(?:\s+Company)?\s+TBM|nuclear subterrene|subter tunnel machine|vitrified(?:\s+|-)tunnels?|glass-lined tunnels?)\b.{0,180}\b(?:design|construction|installation|engineering|survey|study|modernization|hardening|support)\b

\b(?:design of underground installations in rock|literature survey of underground construction methods for application to hardened facilities|utilization of nuclear power plants in underground installation|subsurface deployment of naval facilities|National Committee on Tunneling Technology|NCTT|intercontinental ballistic missile deep basing communication study|life support and chemical biological agent mitigation|iron-chlorine fuel cells)\b.{0,180}\b(?:study|analysis|design|engineering|planning|support|application|assessment)\b

\b(?:blast door|hardened door|portal door|overpressure door|blast valve|blast damper|underground ventilation|shaft exhaust|air handling|HVAC|HEPA|CBRN filtration|redundant power|UPS|standby generation|switchgear|shaft hoist|elevator modernization|portal access control|grouting|shotcrete|rock support|tunnel lining|buried fiber|hardened comms room|protected communications)\b.{0,180}\b(?:underground|subsurface|shaft|tunnel|hardened|portal|installation|facility)\b.{0,120}\b(?:upgrade|modernization|construction|integration|maintenance|support|services)\b

\b(?:Dugway Proving Ground|DPG|West Desert Test Center|WDTC|Utah Test and Training Range|UTTR|Tonopah Test Range|TTR|Nevada Test and Training Range|NTTR|Area\s*6|Aerial Operations Facility|AOF|NVH1|Yucca Flat|NNSA Nevada Field Office|NFO|N2S2|Kirtland(?:\s+Air\s+Force\s+Base)?|KAFB|Manzano Storage Area|Site Able|Coyote Test Field|Technical Area\s*-?\s*(?:1|2|3|4|5)|TA(?:1|2|3|4|5)|R2508|Helendale|Tehachapi|Ant Hill|Yuma Proving Ground|YPG)\b.{0,200}\b(?:tunnel boring machine|TBM|shaft|portal|blast door|overpressure door|hardened comms room|protected communications|underground ventilation|CBRN filtration|shotcrete|rock support|tunnel lining)\b.{0,120}\b(?:support|services|engineering|construction|modernization|integration|sustainment)\b

packs.name: Operational Noise Terms
packs.description: SAM commodity/admin suppressors for NSN line-item buys, medical/clinical purchases, and event/hospitality noise.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Secure Compartmented Facility Engineering
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for secure compartmented facility upgrades, emanations security, and hardened support infrastructure.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Materials Exploitation and Forensics
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for materials forensics, exploitation chains, and advanced material signature analysis.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Signature Phenomenology and Measurement
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for MASINT, signature facilities, and EO/IR multispectral collection support.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Recovery Chain Support
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for debris recovery, secure handling, and recovery logistics.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Operator Site Program Pairs
packs.description: Precision proxy cues that require operator/site or office/site pairs plus support language.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Classified Contract Security Administration
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for DD254/SCG administration, COMSEC management, and classified access workflows.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Controlled Sample Containment and Storage
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for inert handling, contamination control, and secure sample archives.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Advanced Metrology and Trace Analysis
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for trace chemistry, structural metrology, and electron microstructure analysis.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Maritime and Remote Recovery Systems
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for subsea search stacks, remote recovery platforms, and maritime recovery objects.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Optical Tracking and Transient Collection
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for optical tracking, transient imaging, and trajectory reconstruction workflows.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Lab and Office Anchor Expansion
packs.description: Precision proxy cues that require lab/office anchors plus materials, signature, or instrumentation support.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Procurement Continuity and Classified Follow-On
packs.description: Precision proxy cues for classified follow-on procurement continuity and secure ordering vehicles.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Noise Expansion
packs.description: Additional proxy-specific suppressors for generic lab, training, maintenance, outreach, and clinical noise.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Vacuum Cryogenic and High-Field Infrastructure
packs.description: Opt-in exploratory proxy cues for TVAC/UHV/cryogenic and high-field support infrastructure.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Plasma and Propulsion Diagnostics
packs.description: Opt-in exploratory proxy cues for plasma diagnostics and electric propulsion test support.

packs.name: SAM Proxy Advanced Material Process Chain
packs.description: Opt-in exploratory proxy cues for advanced alloy/composite process chains and metamaterial surface work.
